entry.title: SAP MDG feature File Download and File Upload.

Swetha

entry.title: Re: E-Learnings for Getting Started with SAP LeanIX are now available!

Are you able to access the courses successfully?  Are you trying to access the documents from the direct links in the course?  If so, are you getting a specific error message when you try to utilize the links? 

Leean

entry.title: Re: Generate an ID number in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: What exactly did you do in the script? You would need a persistence to generate a sequential ID. This is not part of process automation. So, I doubt if you can generate a sequential ID using a script. You will need an external service with persistance.

entry.title: Re: Can we upload a docker compose file to BTP Cloud Foun...
entry.content: You can run containers in BTP Cloud Foundry (check https://github.com/SAP-samples/cf-mta-examples/tree/main/cf-app-docker). But you can't just provide a Docker compose file.

entry.title: Re: SAP PaPM Cloud UM – Enhancing Report Management with the power of generative AI copilot – Joule
entry.content:
Hi Milica,

also thx for the very helpful Information.

Got a question: 

If you ask Joule to display specific reports from PaPM, will Joule then trigger the corresponding function chain in PaPM right at that moment ?

Best Regards

Marcus

entry.title: Re: E-Learnings for Getting Started with SAP LeanIX are now available!
entry.content:
From the SAP Learning Hub, other courses were fine to play and view the content, but for this course access denied always appears.  

SAP LeanIX Roll-out and Adoption Toolkit Roadmap Template.pptx

This XML file does not appear to have any style information associated with it. The document tree is shown below.
<Error>
<Code>AccessDenied</Code>
<Message>Access denied</Message>
</Error>

entry.title: How to change Checkbox state to true of a object in a sapgui Tree?
entry.content:
Hello, I need to create a sapgui scripting code to select a file in a sap tree based on its name. To do this, I recorded a script selecting an item in the tree and setting its checkbox to true. This generated the following code:

 

session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlTREE_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell").selectItem "Child12","2"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlTREE_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell").ensureVisibleHorizontalItem "Child12","2"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlTREE_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell").changeCheckbox "Child12","2",true

 

From this and visiting the sapgui api documentation, I built a code to get the subnodes and then change the status of the checkbox to 1 which is equal to true, using the GetSubNodesCol and GetSubNodeTextByKey functions. However, this did not work.
Here is my code:

 

Set tree = session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlTREE_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell")
Set ListNodeKeys = tree.getallnodekeys

For Each nodeKey In ListNodeKeys
    nodeText = tree.GetNodeTextByKey(nodeKey)
    If nodeText = "TBR" Then
        Set SubNodeKeys = tree.GetSubNodesCol(nodeKey)
        
        For Each subNodeKey In SubNodeKeys
            subNodeText = tree.GetNodeTextByKey(subNodeKey)
            If subNodeText = "FAT_TBR_xxxx" Then 
               tree.SetCheckBoxState(subNodeKey,1)
               MsgBox "Subnó: " & subNodeText
            End If   
        Next
    End If
Next

 

 

Here is a picture of what the tree looks like where I need to change the checkbox of the files based on the name.

entry.title: Re: Manage your hierarchies in FIORI 1/3

Thank you
Markus

entry.title: Re: Can we upload a docker compose file to BTP Cloud Foun...
entry.content: Okay, I will try and write back whatever the result I will get

entry.title: Re: SAC Live Connection Report is failed to refresh
entry.content: Hi William,

entry.title: OSE + table + selection type: single + left click => no onSelect
entry.content:
Hi,
could anyone with SAC and a live BW connection please confirm that onSelect is not triggerd by a left click (but with a right click) when:

  • unified story mode used
  • live BW connection (ours: 7.5 SP 31)
  • table with 1 measure in columns & 1 dimension in rows
  • selection type: single

     


    A single left click in the table should trigger the onSelect event. This is not the case anymore. Now in order to trigger onSelect you have to right click into the table.
    When Selection Type is set to Default then a left click triggers onSelect.

ty for your help
BR
E.

entry.title: Re: Not able to create goods issue with BAPI_GOODSMVT_CRE...
entry.content: Try to add leading zeroes to STO / PO number

If it is the course itself can you try this link: SuccessFactors Learning: Content Player for SAP LeanIX Roll-out & Adoption Toolkit and let me know if you are able to get in. 

Thanks!

documents within the course!

But the online content is not available.  Seems unit 2 with the templates cannot be completed even though I finish the assessment.

entry.title: Re: SAC Live Connection Report is failed to refresh
entry.content: Hi William, no same error when I ran from BW side as well.

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello @KStrothmann 

    Previously we have implemented Event Mesh standalone application as POC and integrated with our S4HANA 2020 SP02 system.  We were able to create channel with service key and able to push S4HANA events to the event mesh.

 Unfortunately, after the migration of event mesh to IS , we are not able to activate channel in S4HANA. Getting bad request error.

  After migrating to EMIS, we have created RFC destination, OAuth manually in SAP and then provided these details in the channel. We are unable to activate the channel now in S4HANA 2020 sp02.

 Also, the instance generated in BTP for new EMIS does not have "namespace".

 

Thank you,

Shiva

entry.title: Re: E-Learnings for Getting Started with SAP LeanIX are now available!
entry.content: Can you try this link: https://d.dam.sap.com/a/h8zqfdU/20240215_LeanIX_Roll-out_and_Adoption_Toolkit.pdf?inline=true&rc=10&doi=SAP1150339 and let me know if you still get an error?

entry.title: Re: Enable Now and Help Menu for Web Dynpro apps

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – App Variants are the EASY way to control App Features
entry.content:
Great blog, thanks!

I was able to get it up and running in the development system but can not transport it to test/prd.

When I publish the app variant, I linked it to the workbench request I had created in SE01 but only see antry with R3TR/LRCD....in it. When I transport this to test, the app variant is not visible.

Can you tell me which object I should normally see in the workbench request?

 

Kr

Michiel

entry.title: Re: E-Learnings for Getting Started with SAP LeanIX are now available!
entry.content: This link works, thanks.

entry.title: Re: MD04 - Storage Location stock below Available Stock?
entry.content:
Hello @PiotrPuczka 

I guess you can achieve that with BAdI MD_ADD_ELEMENTS. MRP list or stock/requirements list can be manipulated here - just move the not planned SLOC segment. However be aware that not planned SLOC is a different MRP planning segment from the plant/MRP area. Thus such a change might have far reaching side effects - test thoroughly. Or better yet, convince the customer that it is not a business critical change and it should not be implemented.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: E-Learnings for Getting Started with SAP LeanIX are now available!
entry.content: Glad to hear it!

entry.title: Re: SAP RISE Migration Options for Partner
entry.content:
Hello, thanks for the blog, it is very hard to find some detailed steps on the procedure. I have a question about "1.1  System Copy process S/4HANA to S/4HANA".

On the migration server, what activities exactly are performed? The partner installs an ASCS and PAS without installing a database instance and then the partner performs a database refresh/move to the existing database under rise?

Are there any guides/Community articles where this is described further?

I only found this other article https://community.sap.com/t5/additional-blogs-by-members/partner-led-migration-rise-with-sap-step-by-step-process/ba-p/13562147

 

Thank you1

entry.title: Re: SAC Live Connection Report is failed to refresh
entry.content: ... or some errors in your report design, that causes this excessive memory consumption

entry.title: Re: Tax code for sales and purchase
entry.content: Can you see those within FBKP -> automatic postings (T030K) -> Taxes on sales/purchases -> select transaction VST or MWS (You could also browse tables T007A, T0007B and T030K)

entry.title: Re: CDS Views 7.5x Quick Reference

I've taken some notes about some sentences of ABAP 7.56 which I hadn't heard about.

entry.title: Re: Federating queries to Databricks from SAP Datasphere for real-time analytics in SAP Analytics Cl
entry.content:
Hi @Sangeetha_K,

thanks for your informative post!

In step two you mention the OAuth2 authentication for production scenarios instead of basic authentication with username and password. However, when choosing the generic JDBC connection in Datasphere connections tab, username and password are enforced. Do you know what details to enter for OAuth2 authentication? We're trying to implement the OAuthM2M mechanism as outlined here in step 6. 

Thanks a lot in advance!

Damian

entry.title: users getting authentication failed error when trying to access SF instance
entry.content: We have implemented IAS recently and few password users are encountering an "authentication failed" error when attempting to access the SuccessFactors instance, and they are required to reset their passwords daily to regain access. Can someone assist in identifying the potential cause of this issue?

entry.title: Re: Master Data Management: The Foundation for Modern Enterprise Data Architecture
entry.content: If you already have an enterprise data governance program in place, then I would recommend standardizing on a single solution.  Migrating to SAP MDG as that single solution I think would be dependent on how large you expect your SAP S/4HANA footprint to be in your overall system landscape.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integrated Planning usage in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: we have exactly the same scenario, and the answer to your questions is, unfortunately no, and there are no plans for BW-IP and SAC.  We still have to use AfO workbooks or direct RSPLAN for the IP functionality

entry.title: I need to settle a WBS to another WBS element using KB15N . How can I find out what's settled?
entry.content:
I have a requirement to settle a WBS to another WBS element using KB15N . 

(I cannot use CJ88 since settled to WBS changes according to criteria)

How can I find out what's settled? 

1. is there a field in ACDOCA table saying this being settled

2. Is there a report I can run to see which ones are settled and which is not ?

entry.title: Re: TM Document Types in S4 Hana Public Cloud..
entry.content:
Hi Thomas,

Thank you for your response.
That would mean that Freight Unit of type SFU1 would always be used for External TM planning (Scope Item - 6W1). Assuming somewhere in the Output Profile of the Freight Unit type, it is setup that it is to be sent out using the Generic Transportation service. 
Thereby I can have a specific Shipping condition similar to 05 for external planning but the Freight Unit type would remain the same.

Hope my understanding is correct.

Regards,
Nikhil

entry.title: SAP HANA Cloud release January 2025 Round-up
entry.content:
Dear SAP HANA Cloud Enthusiasts,

As we bid farewell to an incredible 2024 and step into the new year, we are thrilled to share a comprehensive collection of the latest videos, blogposts, and resources from the SAP HANA Cloud Q4 2024 release. Wishing you a prosperous and innovative New Year!

 

What’s New Teaser

Explore the latest innovations in SAP HANA Cloud with Lead Product Manager Thomas Hammer! In this exciting teaser, he shares his favorite features from the newest release.

Watch it now on YouTube.

What’s New blogpost

Intrigued by the teaser? Explore our "What’s New in SAP HANA Cloud in December 2024" blog post for an in-depth look and find valuable links for further insights.

Read it here!

 

 

What's New Webinar

Prefer watching over reading? Our 'What’s New' webinar is just for you! Join our Product experts for an in-depth view of the latest features. Watch anytime here!

 

Additional information


In addition to our regular release updates, make sure to check the following valuable content provided by our team:

  • Explore more on Calculation View features in this blogpost by @jan_zwickel 
  • New Machine Learning and NLP features in SAP HANA Cloud 2024 Q4 by @ChristophMorgen
  • Elastic Compute Nodes for on-demand capacity  by @SeungjoonLee
  • The next step towards cost-effectiveness and scalability with SAP HANA Cloud Multitenancy by @ ruediger_karl
Don’t miss out on all the content and remember to follow us in the SAP HANA Community.

Remember to check our content following the # whatsnewinsaphanacloud tag: here

Don’t forget to subscribe and follow SAP HANA Cloud on YouTube to always stay up-to-date regarding the most recent innovations in SAP HANA Cloud.
 
All the best,

Andrea on behalf of the SAP HANA Cloud team

#SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database   #SAP HANA Cloud  

#whatsnewinsaphanacloud

entry.title: Broken Authorization in @sap/cds 8.6.0
entry.content:
I have a cds service secured via "@requires"

 

 

service MyService @(path: '/service/api/v1') @(requires: [
  'AdminRole'
]) {

 

 

When trying to access an entity on this service in CAP 8.5.1 without a proper role assignment I will get the expected error:

{"error":{"code":"403","@Common.numericSeverity":4,"message":"Forbidden"}}

However, when accessing the same entity after updating to CAP 8.6.0 the request is executed and returns a response, completely bypassing the authorization check defined via @requires.

I tested so far only locally via "auth": { "kind": "basic"}, not sure if it also happens with the other authentication strategies

entry.title: Re: CREATE button is not appearing after deployed Fiori A...
entry.content: Please ensure that the creation mode is set to NewPage

entry.title: Re: Doubt for optimize abap code in BADI
entry.content: Hi Sandra_Rossi, using modern ABAP, what can be an Alternative ?

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content:
@ClaudiaMayer 

 

The CRA says CPP2 amount should not be added to Box 16. They should only be reported to Box 16A.

The note https://me.sap.com/notes/3539103 correctly add WT 316 to Box 16A but does not remove it from Box 16.

Ref: https://www.canada.ca/en/revenue-agency/services/forms-publications/publications/rc4120/employers-guide-filing-t4-slip-summary.html#Step6abox16

Would SAP release correction note that takes care of this?

Thanks

entry.title: CER006 is not purtchasable
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to by the CER006, but even if I choose a Country as described, it is not possible.


May some one has an idea?

Regards Christof

entry.title: Re: TM Document Types in S4 Hana Public Cloud..
entry.content:
Hi Nikhil,

yes, your understanding is correct. Freight Unit Type SFU1 is always used for external TM planning. However, you can have different shipping conditions that create freight units of this type so that the freight units are communicated to the external TM planning system.

With best regards,
Thomas Rösch
SAP SE

entry.title: Re: Workzone Transport tool for Workzone BTP Objects has...
entry.content: Can you please confirm / check that the configuration is (still) done as per the documentation? Specifically, the cTMS related destination: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/integrate-sap-cloud-transport-management-service?locale=en-US If this is all still in place and you are still facing the issue, please create a support ticket: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/getting-support?locale=en-US Thank you!

entry.title: Thank you all for your great contributions and a warm Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year
entry.content:
Liebe Community,

Im Namen des Academic Board DACH möchten wir uns ganz herzlich für die tolle Zusammenarbeit in diesem Jahr bedanken und Euch schon einmal eine frohe und besinnliche Weihnachtszeit wünschen und einen guten Wechsel in das neue Jahr mit all den möglichen und hoffentlich friedvollen Herausforderungen. 

Wir bedanken uns auch für Euer Vertrauen und unsere Wahl als Sprecher des Academic Board DACH bis 2026. Gemeinsam mit Euch konnte die SAP ACC 2024 in Wien zu einem großen Erfolg werden und wir konnten einmal mehr lernen, was wir zukünftig noch besser machen wollen. Danke für die nachsichtige Übergabe des Staffelstabes an uns und ein großes Dankeschön an die ausscheidenden Mitglieder. Das Board ist um neue Mitglieder aus unsren Kernbereichen gewachsen und wir sind inzwischen noch universitärer aufgestellt. Wir planen bereits intensiv die SAP ACC2025 mit Euch allen und wollen dabei Eure neuen Ideen umsetzen.

Großer Dank an dieser Stellen an Andre Biener für die unermüdliche Unterstützung und die geduldige Anleitung zu einer strukturierten Umsetzung unserer hochfliegenden Pläne.  

Fröhliche Weihnachten und einen guten Start ins Neue Jahr

Uta Mathis und Hans Scheruhn

Dear Community,

On behalf of the Academic Board DACH, we would like to thank you very much for the great cooperation this year and wish you a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year with all the possible and hopefully peaceful challenges.

We would also like to thank you for your trust and our election as spokespersons for the Academic Board DACH until 2026. Together with you, SAP ACC 2024 in Vienna was a great success and we were once again able to learn what we want to do even better in the future. Thank you for your indulgent handover of the baton to us and a big thank you to the departing members. The Board has grown to include new members from our core areas and we are now even more university-oriented. We are already planning SAP ACC2025 intensively with all of you and want to implement your new ideas.

We would like to take this opportunity to thank Andre Biener for his tireless support and patient guidance in the structured implementation of our ambitious plans.

Merry Christmas and a happy  New Year

Uta Mathis and Hans Scheruhn

entry.title: Re: Using Azure Private Virtual Network Endpoints with SAP Datasphere Replication
entry.content: Out of curiosity, have you done any testing using a replication flow to replicate a local SAP Datasphere delta table to Azure storage? I am having issues where the replication flow sends the parquet files with a single thread even though I configured the rep-flow to use up to 100 from source to target. Because it only uses a single thread / partition to load Azure, it takes 4 hours to load 2 million records as parquet files into the blob container. The SAP Datasphere delta table is only 163 MB compressed in memory and the final output of parquet files is about 3.5 GB for reference.

entry.title: Re: Predictive Accounting in S/4HANA Finance (part I)
entry.content: Thanks for this article. Can I say predictive accounting is technically same as revenue accounting and reporting when I enable this in the sales order ?

entry.title: Re: How to set master recipe to do automatic goods receip...
entry.content:
Hello @MySAPuser2002 

I don't think that's possible with standard configuration. 

Process order related movement types are defined in the OPKO transaction:

As you see it is a global configuration. It's not dependent on anything e.g. order type, control key, etc.

Movement 103 "GR into blocked stck" is not defined for postings against production or process orders. It is used in purchasing only.

What you could do is to post GR to unrestricted stock and then immediately transfer from unrestricted to blocked. Such an automatization can be implemented either with material document posting BAdI or material document output determination. It is not that complex to implement. 

Still what puzzles me is why you would want to receive from production to blocked stocked? What is the business requirement here?

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: I am not able to assign Charactestics to a Combination in "Manage Characteristic Combinatio
entry.content: Hi papa261190, I suggest to create a new case via SAP support portal. I think it will be necessary to analyse the issue in detail. Sorry, I think without a check in your system this can not be resolved. best regards, Michael

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam in Vienna 2025
entry.content: Thank you for the request. I believe you are already in discussions with Witalij on details and logistics.

entry.title: Re: SAP Utilities Core - the Safe Way to Efficient and Innovative Cloud Solutions
entry.content: In the meanwhile, we have launched an enhanced version of Utilities Core, which includes Service Cloud and Field Service Management as well. For 2025, we are working on additional functionality to manage Distributed Energy Resources.

entry.title: Re: Launch Excel SAC Add-In file from SAC folder

Thanks!

entry.title: Payment xml file rejection by Bank - OrgnlPmtInfId>NOTMAPPED</OrgnlPmtInfId
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have configured a new USD account for Deutsche Bank in country NL, executed the payment run F110 with SEPA and generated the XML file and same file sent bank and received file confirmation. 

Bank sending the payment rejection stating the below reason code .. 

Could you please help to fix this issue, we need to do anything in DMEE configuration changes??

Thanks, Sai

entry.title: 3rd Party process for configurable (KMAT) materials - Received at warehouse
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement where we create a third party sales order for configurable (KMAT) materials. The product is expected to be received at the warehouse. The product is not shipped to customer location. In public cloud, we can use item category CBAB for trading goods (3rd Party bought in). However, I don't see similar item category for configurable materials. I would like to check if there is anyone who has/had requirement like this.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: HOWTO redirect and/or filter sapgenpse output
entry.content:
Hi All,

I can't seem to be able to filter (e.g., grep) or redirect the output of sapgenpse to a file? Even tried tee but it always outputs to the terminal and nothing goes into the file with all the usual redirect options (>, 2>&1 etc.)

Without being able to redirect or filter its output, it is almost impossible to script it.

Any ideas? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Hosting CodeJam in Paraguay
entry.content: Thank you. I've recorded the request and will be in touch to discuss details

entry.title: Re: Broken Authorization in @sap/cds 8.6.0
entry.content: Have you filed a Case via SAP Support?

entry.title: Electronic Invoice Sap Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

We created a simple order-to-cash flow (with only one line) and applied a standard discount, S100 - 100%. 

The SD invoice then becomes VAT-only, with a taxable amount of 0 and VAT calculated correctly (22%).

However, the electronic invoice returns an error: 
 
<Code>00422</Code>
<Description>2.2.2.5 <TaxableAmount> not calculated according to the rules defined in the technical specifications: For the invoice: 6001000142 of 2025-01-09</Description>
<Suggestion>Verify that the value of TaxableAmount present in DataSummary has been determined in compliance with the calculation requirements established in the technical specifications</Suggestion>
</Error>
</ErrorList>
 
 
The XML is structured as follows:
 
<LineDetail>
    <LineNumber>1</LineNumber>
    <Description>iPhone 11 128GB Black</Description>
    <Quantity>1.0000000</Quantity>
    <UnitOfMeasure>PZ</UnitOfMeasure>
    <UnitPrice>800.0000000</UnitPrice>
    <DiscountIncrease>
        <Type>SC</Type>
        <Percentage>100.00</Percentage>
        <Amount>800.0000000</Amount>
    </DiscountIncrease>
    <TotalPrice>0.00</TotalPrice>
    <VATRate>22.00</VATRate>
</LineDetail>
<SummaryData>
    <VATRate>22.00</VATRate>
    <TaxableAmount>800.00</TaxableAmount>
    <Tax>176.00</Tax>
    <VATCollectibility>I</VATCollectibility>
</SummaryData>
</GoodsServicesData>

Can someone give us a suggestion on how we can solve this problem?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Payment xml file rejection by Bank - OrgnlPmtInfId>NO...
entry.content:
• Insure he field is mapped in DMEE (VFDAT?) or BAdI (BADI FIEB_MAPPING_X?)
  • Insure the SAP field is filled in F110
  • read blogs such as PAIN.002 - Payment Rejections processing via RFEBKA00

entry.title: How to implement "readonly : update" for draft instances
entry.content:
Introduction

Via the customer influence channel the requirement was raised to "allow to modify a field for a draft entity that is not already created in persistency table, the record only exists in draft table." when the field has been configured as readonly : update in the behavior definition.  

Since this does not work out of the box, I will show how such a behavior, a field which is read-only after the first draft has been saved can be achieved in RAP using the SAP standard. 

  

Problem description 

When a field is being defined as readonly for update  

 

 

  field ( readonly : update ) AgencyId;

 

 

and if this application is draft-enabled it turns out, that the field cannot be edited after having provided an intial value in the first dialogue of your application. 

Solution ( implementation ) 

You can test this code with sample RAP business object that is being created using the following tutorial:  

Build an SAP Fiori elements App Using the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP) – Beginner [RAP100] | SAP Tutorials

The desired behavior can be achieved by using dynamic feature control. Instead of using the statement readonly : update you can use the following syntax in your behavior defintion.  

 

 

 field ( features : instance ) AgencyId;

 

 

And in your behavior implementation in the get_instance_features() method you have to implement code that checks if an active instance of the travel entity is available. 

If yes, the field will be made readonly. If not, and this is only the case when the object is being created as a draft but has not been persisted yet, the field will still be editable.  

 

 

  METHOD get_instance_features.

    DATA result_line LIKE LINE OF result.

    " read relevant travel instance data
    READ ENTITIES OF zrap100_r_traveltp_rou IN LOCAL MODE
      ENTITY Travel
        FIELDS ( AgencyId )
        WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
      RESULT DATA(travels)
      FAILED failed.

    LOOP AT travels INTO DATA(travel).

      SELECT SINGLE * FROM zrap100_r_traveltp_rou
                      WHERE TravelId = -TravelId
                      INTO (travel_cds_line).

      result_line-%tky = travel-%tky.

      IF travel_cds_line IS NOT INITIAL.
        result_line-%features-%field-AgencyId =  if_abap_behv=>fc-f-read_only .
      ELSE.
        result_line-%features-%field-AgencyId = if_abap_behv=>fc-f-unrestricted.
      ENDIF.

      APPEND result_line TO result.

    ENDLOOP.
  ENDMETHOD.

 

 

 

Result

The app now behaves as follows: 

  • We create a new travel instance.
    1. We enter a value for the field AgencyId
    2. and press the "Back" button


 

  • We can now see the newly created instance in our drafts
    1. We select the editing status "Own Draft"   
    2. We select the newly created entity   



 

  • When we now edit the entity again we see that the field AgencyId can still be edited
    1. We press Create to persist the data.




The newly created item shows up and we press Edit again




  • Finally we can see that the field AgencyId has become readonly because an active instance exists.

entry.title: Re: transport SAC data between prod and dev tenets
entry.content:
thanks Ashok,
how do i empty it ?

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content: When running program RPCAUDK0 (transaction PC00_M07_RCON) in the Flat display mode, the ALV report does not display boxes 16A and 27A. I have tried to modify the layout columns, but these boxes do not appear in the selection of boxes. This report is used by payroll services to reconcile the T4 boxes. Has anyone encountered this problem, or have been able to add these columns to the display.

entry.title: Re: Replication Flow Blog Series Part 7 – Performance
entry.content: Thank You for the posting. I was curious how SAP Datasphere delta table to Azure Blob partitions are calculated. At the moment, I can't get wide delta table replication object to use more than one partition/thread, and it is resulting in a painfully slow replication process to Azure. For example, 462 million cells take 4 hours. Does not appear to be a bandwidth issue between AWS SAP Datasphere US East and Azure US Central Blod. Parquet files are only 150 kb each but only producing about 1.73 150kb files per second. I am sure the root of the problem is the lack of parallel threads but even when I set the replication flow to 100 source and 100 target, the individual table in the flow only uses a single partition/thread. Any thoughts as to why SAP Datasphere calculates only one partition/thread?

entry.title: Re: Broken Authorization in @sap/cds 8.6.0
entry.content: Hi, could you give us access to your project (or better even, a minimal sample) and provide detailed steps to reproduce this?

entry.title: Define Statutory Report layout not enabled (F2131)
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I want to extend a statutory report in Define Statutory Report app in the starter customizing environment - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud edition. The options to Add, Copy, Upload, and Delete are not enabled in the Define Statutory Report Fiori application (see please screenshot n.1). I tried to Adapt UI and add the missing buttons but the system gives me errors (screenshot 2) and a report definition can NOT even be selected so report definition can NOT be extended, copied, downloaded or deleted. 

What is the problem? 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Hosting SAP CodeJam in Bielefeld, Germany
entry.content:
Thank you. We have received your request and put it into a our planning board.  We are looking at possible dates in Q1 and a topic expert will be in touch soon.

Thanks,
Thomas Jung

entry.title: Working with HANA CV / MDS Cubes. Do not see any additional Dimensions available besides Private.
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

I have been investigating HANA CV / MDS cubes for possible SAC performance improvements.  Have a standard star schema, 1 Aggregation using a table as data source which is joined to 2 Dimension CV's. Pretty straight forward.  Have the join cardinality and join type acceptable for MDS ( no error messages ) . Issue: When I go to select the "dimension" attributes, I can only see the private attributes of the Aggregation and the names of each of the joined dimensional CV's. I do not have the ability to select any of the attributes in the joined dimensions. I have looked at all the docs/ SAP help and tutorials and researched under SAP 4Me notes. Cannot find a reason for this behavior. How can I add the attributes from the joined dimensional CV's ?

I appreciate any help on this. Images are attached.

Xavier

Hi @juanantonioga 

It should be based on this screenshot I just took in my demo environment : 

Can you share whether these columns are standard or custom ? The ones in my screenshot above are the standard ones.

I think yours might be custom, in which case all you have to do is to switch them to type=Percent

All the best,

Xavier

The only way to modify properties is with "Go to Code" page.

Thank you.

entry.title: Sales Data of the newly created Account is not displayed.
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have created a few accounts, but the sales data tab for those accounts is empty. I can manually add the sales data but I need the data to be populated by default as soon as I create those accounts. 

Please Help.

entry.title: Re: CSRF validation fails (403 Forbidden) from SAP Build...
entry.content:
With the valuable help of SAP Support I was able to resolve the issue. It turns out the problem was not the CSRF token itself, but rather that the upload URL of the FileUploader was incomplete. 

More precisely, the uploadURL was defined like this in the fragment:

 

<core:FragmentDefinition
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
	xmlns:u="sap.ui.unified">
x
        <u:FileUploader
            id="AttaUpload"
            name="AttaUpload"
            uploadUrl="uploadUrl="/sap/opu/odata/sap/<MY_SERVICE>/<MyEntitySet>('{<ID>}')/<MyDependentEntitySet>"
            useMultipart="false"
            change="onFileChange"
            afterDialogClose="afterDialogClose"
            uploadStart="onUploadStart"
            uploadComplete="onUploadComplete"
            buttonOnly="true"
            uploadOnChange="true"
            sendXHR="true"
            buttonText="{@i18n>new}"
            icon="{sap-icon://attachment-photo}"
             />
            
</core:FragmentDefinition>

 

 At runtime this produced an URL like so:

 https://<ourBTPAccount>.launchpad.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/<MY_SERVICE>/<MyEntitySet>('<ID>')/<MyDependentEntitySet

And this URL is not correct because it is relative to just the WorkZone launchpad, and not to my app. 

When in reality, the correct URL has to contain the Destination Service ID for the destnation of our backend service, something like this:

 https://<ourBTPAccount>.launchpad.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/alphanumericalGUID.<destinationName>.<destinationName>/~moreRandomNumbers-~sap/opu/odata/sap/<MY_SERVICE>/<MyEntitySet>('<ID>')/<MyDependentEntitySet

I was able to resolve by picking up the current URL at runtime and setting it to the fileUploader uploadUrl, as follows:

In fragment XML:

- changed the uploadUrl in the fragment to just "/<MyEntitySet>('{<ID>}')/<MyDependentEntitySet"

In extension controller:

 - declare global variable sServiceURL

- in onAfterRendering lifecycle event: capture the runtime path  into sServiceURL

- in fileUploader related event (for me it was onFileChange): concatenate sServiceURL with <MyEntitySet>('<ID>')/<MyDependentEntitySet to get the full URL, and use method setUploadURL of fileUploader class to change to this new URL

Here is the abridged controller code:

 

sap.ui.define([
    "sap/m/MessageBox"
], function (MessageBox) {
    "use strict";

    var sServiceUrl; // oData service URL 

    return {
onAfterRendering: function () {
            var oView = this.getView();

            /* Get service URL at runtime. This will be used in FileUploader event to complete the upload URL 
            including CF destination service ID. It cannot be fetched there
            because at that event there is no Model defined for the view any more */
            sServiceUrl = oView.getModel().sServiceUrl;

},
       //      FileUploader Events:
        onFileChange: function (oEvent) {

            var oFileUploader = oEvent.getSource();
            var oFile = oFileUploader.oFileUpload.files[0];
            this._file = oFile;
            console.log("File selected:", oFile);

            /* Destroy the header before each new uplaod.
               Otherwise the parameters are just accumulating on each consecutive call
               and the CSRF tokens are not recognised by SAP Server and refused */
            oFileUploader.destroyHeaderParameters();

            var headerParmaSlug = new sap.ui.unified.FileUploaderParameter();
            headerParmaSlug.setName('slug');
            headerParmaSlug.setValue(oFileUploader.getValue());
            oFileUploader.addHeaderParameter(headerParmaSlug);

            /* Get the CSRF token value and add as new header parameter */
            this.csrfToken = this.getView().getModel().getSecurityToken();
            var headerParmaCSRF = new sap.ui.unified.FileUploaderParameter();
            headerParmaCSRF.setName('x-csrf-token');
            headerParmaCSRF.setValue(this.csrfToken);
            oFileUploader.addHeaderParameter(headerParmaCSRF);

            /* Set uploadURL with the full service path. This ensures that 
            the destination service ID on CP will be correctly inserted into the URL */
            var newUploadURL = sServiceUrl + oFileUploader.getUploadUrl();
            oFileUploader.setUploadUrl(newUploadURL);

        },
}
});

 

Again thanks to SAP Support for having pointed out the URL issue, as it never even occurred to me to look past the 403 error in the approuter log 🙂

entry.title: How to send out IDocs to Advanced Event Mesh using SAP Application Interface Framework & AIFAEM
entry.content:
Introduction

In my last Blog here I demonstrated how to send out enhanced BOR Events from a ECC or S/4HANA System using AIFAEM. This also can be done with Outbound Idocs. In this Blog I will show this based on the DEBMAS07 IDoc.

 

Prerequisites

  • AIF installed (in S/4 already pre-installed)
  • AIFAEM installed (see my blog referenced above)
  • SM59 REST Destination to AEM prepared (see my blog referenced above)

ALE Setup

ALE Port Definition

If not already existend, you will need a Port Function in WE21 to pass Idocs to AIF -> /AIF/SINGLE_IDOC_PORT_FUNCTION

Partner Profile

I defined the Logical System "AEM" for my Partner Profile ( Transaction SALE -> Define Logical System) and added the Partner Profile in WE20:

Distribution Model

In BD64 I added DEBMAS to my Model View

 

AIF Setup

DDIC Structure Definition

Creating DDIC Object in /AIF/IDOC_GEN

AIF Interface Design

The Previously created ZAIF_DEBMAS07 is the SAP Structure of the AIF Interface. Since it is Outbound, SAP Structure means Source Structure. Target Structure (AIF RAW Structure) for AIFAEM should always consist of CONTROLLER (Structure /AIF/AEM_CONTROLLER) and DATA (actual Payload). 

 

 

 

@EndUserText.label : 'Event Message'
@AbapCatalog.enhancement.category : #EXTENSIBLE_ANY
define structure zaif_aem_debmas_event_message {

  controller : /aif/aem_controller;
  data       : zaif_aem_debmas_event;

}

 

 

The Data Component consists of the Cloud Event Header Data and the DEBMAS Idoc as Data

 

 

@EndUserText.label : 'DEBMAS Event'
@AbapCatalog.enhancement.category : #EXTENSIBLE_ANY
define structure zaif_aem_debmas_event {

  include /aif/aem_ce_header;
  data : zaif_debmas07;

}

 

 

The Data-Segment could be anything you want to send out. If you decide to have a custom Target Message, you will need to do Field Mappings for the Fields you want to expose. The advantage compared to BOR events is that the Data is already in the Source Message, so no Select on the Database or CDS View is necessary. To keep it simple I assigned the Source Data Type (the Idoc), then the Mapping with Move-Corresponding just passes all the Fields from Source to Target.

AIF Interface Definition

/N/AIF/CUST -> Define Interfaces

AIF needs a Dummy Proxy Outbound Class here, otherwise the Structure Mapping Customizing assumes it is Inbound. After maintaining the class the Transaction might overwrite the RAW Structure, please make sure to have the right one there ( here ZAIF_AEM_DEBMAS_EVENT_MESSAGE). Also there is no Method required since we only the Class as Dummy Entry. This way we also make sure that this interface is not called with any Class method. You can also remove the Class when Structure Mapping is done. Alternative without Class would be: Swap RAW and SAP Structure (RAW Structure = Idoc Structure, SAP Structure = AEM Structure), define Structure Mapping, switch back.

/N/AIF/CUST ->Additional Interface Properties -> Specify Interface Engine

If you are using more than one Interface with this Structure, you might need to maintain the Interface Determination.  /N/AIF/CUST -> System Configuration -> Interface Determination -> Interface Determination For Idoc Interfaces

Structure Mapping

/N/AIF/CUST -> Define Structure Mapping

Source Structure ZAIF_DEBMAS07

Target Structure CONTROLLER

I defined a Global Fix Value here (/N/AIF/CUST -> Define Fix Values) because it is the same for all Interfaces. The Global Fix Value AEM_DEST is explained in my other Blog here

Target Structure DATA

Fix Values:

Field Mappings:

ID, Source and Time are mapped with AIFAEM Function Modules. DATA-EDIDC & DATA-E1KNA1M do have a Sub-Table from the Source Structure assigned, so we can define indirect Mapping & Move-Corresponding.

Source Structure E1KNA1M

Target Structure DATA-DATA-E1KNA1M

Since Source and Target Structure have the same Sub Structures and Fields, we can simply use Move-Corresponding

Source Structure EDIDC

Target Structure DATA-DATA-EDIDC

Since Source and Target Structure have the same Sub Structures and Fields, we can simply use Move-Corresponding

Assign Action

Action has to be in place before (/N/AIF/CUST -> Define Action)

Test

In Transcation BD12 we can send Customers via Idoc

This Message should be returned:

In WE05 we can see the successfull Idoc:

AIF Error Monitoring:

In SAP Cloud Integration I have set up an Iflow to consume this Topic with the AEM Adapter + Log the Payload in the MPL

Connection Parameters can be taken from the AEM Cluster Manager -> Connect -> View by Protocol -> Solace Messaging

Let´s see if the IDoc was consumed:

If I click on Payload I can see the JSON:

in Notepad++:

That´s it!

entry.title: Best Practices to Deploy MDK Application in Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi,

I need an help to understand the best practice to deploy MDK Application in Cloud Foundry. (CI/CD Pipelines whould be the best way but needs to be investigated using sap/mdk-tools, I do not found any guide at the moment)

We have 3 Cloud Foundry Environment on the relatives 3 BTP SubAccounts: Development, Quality, Production.

In manual way, from BAS after selecting the Cloud Foundry environment where the App needs to be deployed, we simply use the Application -> MDK Deploy 

Then, after the deploy of the Dev Project in the Dev CF I found all the Instances of the App under "Services -> Instances".

Otherwise, when I first deployed the Dev Project in the Quality CF i can't see any Instances under "Services -> Instances" of the app but the Quality App works well.

Then, If I made a new deploy of Dev Project in Dev CF, the Dev app ask for Update and at same way if I made a new deploy of Dev Project in Quality CF, the Quality CF ask for Updates. Like expected.

Now, I configured the Production Environment in Sap Mobile Service, I builded the APK with Mobile Cloud Build and I run the APK without run the deploy of the Dev Project in the Production CF. 

I expected the app not to works, but it does. What I'm missing ?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Enhanced Error Handling within SAP Digital Manufacturing Production Processes
entry.content:
Hello @ManoelCosta,

I would like to ask you, if it is possible to use variable (named p_message) in error message - I would like to pass some information to the message response (custom API response) while using Error End control block:

 

I would expect similar or the same functionality like for example when using POD Message where ${varName} can be used.

Thank you very much!

Apodasch

entry.title: Re: Redirect Error when trying to open Enable Now Manager
entry.content: This also happens when your Cloud SEN instance has been shut down, such as when your license has expired and you have not renewed. You get a month or two of grace period, along with automated messages to the SEN "owner" (the person who signed the purchase contract for SEN at your organization), but if you don't renew your subscription, your SEN instance will be taken offline, resulting in this message. It's not a very helpful message, as it does not indicate what the problem is.

entry.title: Re: How to find SOAP XML message based on a field value l...
entry.content: Thanks Saravanan!!

entry.title: Parallel operations in IBP S&OP TS Based Heuristics
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
There is a requirement to produce the FG through multiple operations in multiple resources.
For example, if there is a demand of 1000 & there are 4 separate Resources to be used to produce the required quantity. In those 4 resources, dependent demand for each Resource should be 1000 each.
At the end of the week, the final receipts should be 1000 for the FG.
This should be achieved through TS based S&OP Heuristics. 
Please suggest the best approach to achieve this scenario,

Regards,
A.Basu

entry.title: Re: Automatic valuation of inspection point for physical samples.
entry.content: Hi ...Iam facing the same issue, could you please let me know if you got the solution.

entry.title: Re: Federating queries to Databricks from SAP Datasphere for real-time analytics in SAP Analytics Cl
entry.content:
Hello @DGA  . Thanks for your feedback & question. 

For OAuth2 authentication, please use the jdbc url mentioned in Step 6 (OAuthM2M section) mentioned in official documentation. Values from the Username and Password fields  are not used for the OAuth2 authentication scenario, so you can enter any string value such as "test" for those fields (just because they are mandatory) . 

Please just make sure you enter the enter correct details for the  AppID (clientID) and secret (MsEntra managed SP Token created in Databricks) in the jdbc url which is important :

jdbc:databricks://adb-1xxxxxxxxxxxxx.azuredatabricks.net:443;httpPath=<path to sql warehouse compute>;AuthMech=11;Auth_Flow=1;OAuth2ClientId=<Service Principal Client ID> ;OAuth2Secret=<SP Token value>;IgnoreTransactions=1;autocommit=false;UseNativeQuery=0; ConnCatalog=<catalog_name>;ConnSchema=<schema_name>

Hope this helps,

Thanks,

Sangeetha

entry.title: Learning administrator privileges - Auto Generate [Item] ID
entry.content:
I've reviewed the following resources: 

Forcing System Generated IDs

2153445 - LMS Auto Generate ID option in Add New Item window

I'm not sure that either of these address my need.  What I'm wanting to know is, is there a way to truly FORCE an auto-generated Item ID for Learning administrators who have the Permission to "Add Item" under Learning Activities.  

Essentially, what I'm hoping to accomplish is to force all but the highest level "super" admins to utilize auto-generated Item IDs when creating new Items within Learning Activities.  With our current settings, admins can see the toggle for "Auto Generate ID" since it is enabled within sysadmin configuration, but they also have the option to turn the toggle off and manually create an Item ID when creating a new Item.  As stated, I'd like to be able to limit the ability to adjust the toggle (or even hide it) while maintaining the ability to Auto Generate Items IDs.  

Thank you!

entry.title: Inspection points or Samples are not getting valuated automatically using the BAPI BAPI_INSPOPER_REC
entry.content:
Hi Team

When using BAPI BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS for result recording the inspection points or samples are not valuated, however all characteristics have been completed by the BAPI and an automatic inspection point valuation is set in the operation detail in the inspection plan.

please help me how to proceed to resolve the issue.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Re: Doubt for optimize abap code in BADI
entry.content: In your case, I think it's best that your first make it work with FOR ALL ENTRIES.

entry.title: Re: CER006 is not purtchasable
entry.content: Asked and answered 10 times in the previous days in the forum. Solution: create a case, SAP will help you.

entry.title: CCode XYZX: Fiscal year change 2025 has failed for some fixed assets (Message number AU271) SAP S/4
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

The fiscal year change in Asset Accounting cannot be completed for two company codes in FI-AA SAP S/4HANA release 2021 SP 05 (11/2023). The assets in these company codes include investment support. For the remaining company codes, whose assets do not include investment support, the fiscal year change was successfully completed.

 

The error message “CCode XYZX: Fiscal year change 2025 has failed for some fixed assets” (Message number: AU271) does not provide helpful information to identify the root cause of the issue.

I have reviewed several SAP Notes (3518095, 2347861, 2484838, 2617420, 2679765), but I could not find a solution or any relevant suggestions to address the problem.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue and found a solution or workaround for this problem?

Thank you for your support and insights!

Best regards,
Emal Rahman

entry.title: Re: Best Practices to Deploy MDK Application in Cloud Foundry
entry.content: When you refer to deploying the app are you deploying to Mobile Services (iOS and Android) or are you deploying to Cloud Foundry (MDK Web Client) or both?

entry.title: Re: activate document splitting
entry.content:
Follow this path and active document splitting 

Financial Accounting (New)>General Ledger Accounting (New)>Business Transactions>Document Splitting>Activate Document Splitting

Activating the Document splitting for company code my issue is resolved

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Dear Suzanne,

I have a quick question here,

If the certification is earned too early, for example, in 2021 year, and when taking the stay certified assessment, will the expiration date expanded? (the expiration date is also 31.03.2025)

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Hybrid Partner Add-ons for on-premise & BTP ABAP SaaS
entry.content:
@AustinKloske thanks for the feedback.

All makes sense :). CAL is nice, especially for testing your add-ons deployment (error, time to deploy etc.) with the latest versions of SAP product but the cost can quickly become a barrier if you need more than the trial. On your side, we often use the API Hub for mostly UI5 app development which is a game-changer.

Regarding your comment on the UCON, I believe it is not enable by default, you have to do it yourself. Did you check if it was activated in the system?

Also, regarding the system landscape for add-ons / multi-tenant SaaS solutions on the ABAP Environment, I found this article System Landscape/Account Model - Help Portal on how to setup the landscape and it is such a complex setup that involved 2 Global Account and multiple sub-accounts. Strange...

I wonder if it is still accurate because the video from the SAP Developers team at Devtoberfest 2024 mentionnes a much easier infrastructure (which is the one we use and describe below).

In general, I believe that One Global Account to rule them all is the best approach 🙂

Finally, regarding add-ons development as a Partner: is it still a "thing" to develop add-ons directly in customers on-premise system (with the good old AAK)?

Many our customers are now running S/4 (some of them under the RISE offer), so we mostly develop functionalities and apps with the RAP model (CAP model also). "Old-school" ABAP developments (like executable programs with GUI UI) are often forbidden or highly monitor. What could be a sustainable use case across SAP customers for this type of add-ons? 

With the new approach "Keep the Core Clean", it could be recommended for customers to consume a SaaS Partner solution either:

  • in a dedicated sub-account from the Partner global account (as a subscription) or
  • have their own BTP instance if they really want to run your app (import with the landscape portal) on their own "terms" (specially security).

There is still a lot to be done to allow partner to develop SaaS as fast and cost-effective as on other platforms (google, aws are cheaper options to ship a SaaS even to SAP customers) but it is getting there!

Curious to know your opinion 😉

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Lessons Learned: CSRF Token troubleshooting with S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @gregorw ,

I did try the "csrf": true and the "csrfInBatch": true options, that but they didn't work.

However, looking into the documentation now I noticed there's an Advanced Configuration section that may do the trick. I'll test it and get back with results.

Thanks,
Lucas Rigo

entry.title: Re: The FM FP_JOB_CLOSE throws error.
entry.content:
Hi mustafa_74199,

After Activation of FPADS also am facing the same issue. Can you please help me to sort out this.

Regards,
Ganesh P

entry.title: Re: Broken Authorization in @sap/cds 8.6.0
entry.content:
Hi patricebender,

I investigated some more, and the issue is not with @requires as initially thought but with @restrict.

This code worked on 8.5.1. When a user without the attribute costCenter = 'DE' tried to access the entity, the call returned 403 - Forbidden

entity MyEntity @(restrict: [{ grant: '*', where: `$user.costCenter = 'DE'`}]) { key ID : Integer; name : String; }

Now with CAP 8.6.0 the call is passed on to the ON READ handler in the javascript implementation.

I found the corresponding change in the CHANGELOG.md of the new version:

+ Simple static clauses (e.g., `$user.level > 5`) are no longer evaluated by the server but added to the respective SQL regardless. As a result, requests may receive a response of `2xx` with an empty body instead of a `403`

I feel like this is a breaking change that should have been mentioned in the December release notes, because now I'll need to perform this check in the ON READ handler of my implementation manually.

entry.title: Re: Predictive Accounting in S/4HANA Finance (part I)
entry.content: Thanks for your comment @subhadeep_das. Predictive accounting is only used in sales order and T&E based on the expected service dates in an specific extension ledger. SAP RAR has much more complex rules to determine postings and they usually determine 0L ledger.

entry.title: S2S Requirement
entry.content:
We have a new client who is an Azure subscriber. They are questioning why a S2S VPN is required. They would prefer TLS 1.2. 

Can you tell us why the S2S VPN is required? The client would not like to use this option.

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content: We have a question regarding the new Account Number fields on the XML files.  There is a field for BN9 and a field for BN15.  We currently create our T4 XML files for each BN9 which means one file will contain 2 RP#’s that belong to that BN9 number.  Can we still submit our files to CRA  where one XML file contains multiple RP#’s?  SAP will create the file successfully but we are concerned because we have received 2 different answers from CRA reps and the wording on their website is inconsistent.  If we can’t submit a file with multiple RP#s then we will need to change our Tax Reporting Units and we would prefer not to do that.   Has SAP been told by CRA that we have to submit each RP# separately in 2024 and beyond?

entry.title: Re: SAP TM Private Cloud Implementation - Query
entry.content:
Hello Saurabh,

For embedded deploy, SAP Transportation Management uses bgRFC concept.

I advise you to first understand the concept of bgRFC: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_AS_ABAP_751_IP/753088fc00704d0a80e7fbd6803c8adb/48927c2caa6b17cee10000000a421937.html?version=7.51.2

After that, you  can see more detail how bgRFC works int TM: https://me.sap.com/notes/2930217

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition for Service | 2023 FPS1 Product Update
entry.content:
Thanks Gert

Are checklists supported?

Would appreciate if you could share the details

Regards

entry.title: Re: Ad-hoc Service with T&M billing (Time & Material)
entry.content:
Great blog, thanks for sharing insights

Can timesheets be entered against Service Request and used in Billing?

Regards

entry.title: Re: TM Document Types in S4 Hana Public Cloud..
entry.content: Hi Thomas,
